item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested next reminder layer, names the recurring pattern of local reminder patches across late submission, missing attachment, format, and page-number errors, and treats the new submit-page reminder only as one-time damage control rather than the default. It moves upstream to consolidation via a unified pre-submit checklist and replacing scattered notices, with a clear boundary against continuing N+1 overlays."}
